scope: Live in-app browser traversal of /agent against API 4160 and Web 3160 with OpenRouter configured; non-create task mutation comment_task proposed and applied through UI.
secretsPolicy: OpenRouter key was loaded from ignored .env.local and is not emitted. No cookies or credentials are stored in this evidence.
steps: Opened http://127.0.0.1:3160/agent in the in-app browser; page rendered authenticated AgentSurface, not login/degraded mock.
Verified GET /api/workspace/agent/tools via authenticated API session: status 200, provider live=true configured=true, comment_task allowed=true.
Submitted browser prompt instructing exactly one mutation tool comment_task for task-vektor-phase-prep with body Live agent non-create browser evidence 2026-07-08.
Observed live assistant response and review panel: 5 proposed changes, 1 selected; selected action title was Прокомментировать задачу.
Clicked Применить выбранное in browser; UI reported Применил 1 изменение and selected action status became применено.
Read back GET /api/workspace/tasks/task-vektor-phase-prep/activity and found persisted comment activity.
expected: A configured live provider should stream a proposal, render a reviewable non-create mutation, execute only the selected action through governed backend routes, and persist/read back the task comment.
actual: Pass for the non-create comment_task browser variant: OpenRouter provider was live/configured, browser proposal was applied, and backend task activity readback found the comment.
evidence: API /agent/tools response: status 200, provider live/configured true, comment_task allowed true.
API task activity readback matched persisted comment body and task id.
observations: The review drawer displayed 5 proposed changes while the prompt requested one mutation; only one action was selected/applied.
After applying one selected action, the drawer also displayed “4 изменения записаны в журнал проекта”, which is a UX copy/count inconsistency to track separately if reproducible.
remainingForRisk: Per-role /agent/tools matrix still needs explicit browser/API evidence.
Generic bound tool redispatch still needs browser execution/readback for at least CRM and communications mutations.
Provider matrix beyond OpenRouter remains not covered unless intentionally scoped out.
